channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Shackled-gods
item.description: Gods in Shackles: The tragic lives of India’s 2,600 captive elephants The story of Raghu and Ammu, featured in The Elephant Whisperers documentary may be one in a billion…. विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्) Sangita Iyer is an author and an award-winning environment and wildlife filmmaker. She is also the Founder, Voice for Asian Elephants Society, National Geographic Explorer The author along with elephant calf Arjun. (Photo | Sangita Iyer) The Elephant Whisperers, an Academy Award winner, reveals the human propensity for love and compassion.
